chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 829 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.22. 2. For orders on CMA No.4045/2019. 3. For hearing of main case. 18.09.2025 This reference application is pending since 2019 without any progress. Even today Mr. Mukesh Kumar, advocate merely seeks time, however, his request is unencumbered with any authority or Vakalatnama. It appears that the applicant, Commissioner Inland Revenue LTO Karachi, is no longer interested in proceeding with this reference application, therefore, in view of judgment CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
